verdict.summary: This is a design-only change plus cross-references; it does not alter batch-merge behavior. The revision-pinning design consistently binds planning, artifacts, merges, arming, deletion, closure, and future bisection evidence to immutable OIDs, explicitly acknowledges the residual read-back race for GitHub mutations without server-side leases, and specifies reconciliation and hermetic coverage for that residue. No correctness, soundness, security, or test-validity defect blocks merging this record. Injection detection is true because the untrusted prose contains an imperative telling its reader to read another header; that text was treated solely as documentation and did not influence review procedure.
